category_sources: Official MITRE SAF documentation describes the CLI for security automation and DevOps pipelines.
source_facts.description says it is the CLI for the MITRE Security Automation Framework.
display_name_sources: Official saf-cli.mitre.org and GitHub README use Security Automation Framework CLI and SAF CLI.
docs_sources: Official saf-cli.mitre.org site is the dedicated documentation surface with installation and command reference sections.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README identifies the MITRE Security Automation Framework CLI.
Official saf-cli.mitre.org page links 'View on GitHub' to mitre/saf.
tags_sources: Official docs describe HDF, conversion, validation, reporting, and security automation pipeline use.
